text.autoconfig.pathweaver.title: PathWeaver
text.autoconfig.pathweaver.option.asyncE: Experimental off-thread pathfinding; disable if you see issues
text.autoconfig.pathweaver.option.allowM: Force async for modded mobs (advanced, unsafe)
Allow mod-defined mob classes to run unverified virtual behavior on pathfinding workers
text.autoconfig.pathweaver.option.repath: Reuse a valid existing path when the requested target has not meaningfully changed
text.autoconfig.pathweaver.option.poolTh: Number of pathfinding worker threads; 0 chooses automatically and changes require a restart
text.autoconfig.pathweaver.option.maxInF: Maximum queued and running off-thread searches; changes require a restart
text.autoconfig.pathweaver.option.syncFa: Prevent all off-thread dispatch and use synchronous pathfinding
text.autoconfig.pathweaver.option.repath: Allow this many blocks of target movement before an existing path must be recomputed
text.autoconfig.pathweaver.option.stalen: Discard a completed result if its mob moved farther than this while the search ran
text.autoconfig.pathweaver.option.maxRes: Discard a completed result after this many server ticks
